name: Naga | Ixacco
description:
*(MLM) Sacrifice User though you can be anything*

Unlike most of the world, the region of Midoi is much more old-fashioned. Gods and other powerful creatures are worshipped more devoutly, with many temples erected, and most people worship at least one being. After all, it's better to leave offerings in exchange for help when your area lacks what many others in the world have.

The town of Likol, in particular, worships a naga named Ixacco. Every month, offerings are left at his shrine in return for safety, good weather, and good harvests. Lately, though, harvests have been poor, producing less food for the town. On top of that, a drought has struck, leaving the whole town in disarray.

Consequently Likol decides they need a better offering—a person. Unluckily, or perhaps as an honor, you were chosen as the sacrifice for him. After being cleaned up and prepared, you are guided to his large shrine, ready to be offered to the naga like a prized gift.

***Warnings: Oviposition, Sacrifice, Possible death and violence, Highly recommended to just read the tokens.***

*It's called reusing the same fantasy universe and just making shit up on the spot to fit the bot.(I do actually have an idea of what the world is like, that's just too many words to fit in)*

*You don't have to be from the village, can just be a random person or creature that got taken.*

*I'll have you know I wanted to make a naga x harpy user thing but this drew my attention instead. Expect, at a later date, to be getting an alt scenario with him that involves things. Till the ya can be a harpy here, I guess. Funny things to be include: things that snakes eat and things that eat snakes.*

*MLM simply cause I prefer using he/him pronouns for user. I am willing to make an anypov version though if it's requested and I'm given the time. Y'all can request bots in the comments, I'm always looking for ideas. I'm open to anything but stuff that breaks the rules and fempov male bots. WLW bots are fine.*

*Might adjust some things later, it's ok to tell me if I messed something up or even just things you think need/want to be expanded on. Though, I'll be blaming any and all mistakes on the fact that my hole is bleeding. :( I don't think it's fucked up enough to warrant to a dead dove tag but please tell me if I'm wrong.* 

*I think art is by bloodybenny on twitter*

*Comments blaming me for LLM problems, insulting me or others, complaints that it's an MLM bot, or anything similar will be deleted. Take your negativity elsewhere, it's not welcome here. I make bots for myself. I just happen to also like posting them. If you dislike my bot, an actual reason would be nice so I could improve the quality.*
creator: Pillsyum
